data.title: Marvell's stock surged after CEO's positive outlook, reflecting investor confidence in company's future prospects.
data.description: Shares of Marvell surged following a positive update from the company's CEO regarding its future outlook. The chipmaker's stock witnessed a significant increase in response to the optimistic reassurance provided by the chief executive. This development was well received by analysts and investors, leading to a rise in Marvell's stock price. The positive assessment of the company's prospects contributed to the rally, with the stock experiencing strong growth as a result.

data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery leads S&P 500 in September due to potential merger, acquisition news.
data.description: Stocks are surging due to possible merger and acquisition activity. Warner Bros. Discovery emerges as the top performer in the S&P 500 for September. Surprisingly, it leads the way as the fastest-rising stock of the month, in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets trading near record high, with technical upgrade. Potential for further growth.
data.description: Cboe Global Markets has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating its improving technical performance. This global trading giant is trading near a record high and is approaching a key technical benchmark. Investors are now wondering if this positive momentum will be sustained in the future.

data.title: WesBanco declares quarterly cash dividend on its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock for shareholders.
data.description: In Wheeling, West Virginia on September 25, 2025, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC), a multi-state bank holding company, declared a quarterly cash dividend for its 6.75% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred shares. The announcement came from the company's Board of Directors.

data.title: SM Energy (NYSE: SM) declares $0.20 quarterly cash dividend per share of common stock. Payable on November 3, 2025.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, SM Energy Company (NYSE: SM) based in Denver disclosed that their Board of Directors has given the go-ahead for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share of common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on November 3, 2025, to shareholders of record at the end of the dividend period.

data.title: Vicarious Surgical appoints Joseph Doherty as Chairman of the Board; he has been on the Board since June 2025.
data.description: A robotics technology company, Vicarious Surgical Inc. (NYSE: RBOT, RBOT.WS), based in WALTHAM, Mass., has appointed Joseph Doherty as the Chairman of its Board of Directors. Doherty, who has been a Board member since June 2025, brings valuable insight to the company in the field of robotic surgery. This move is aimed at further enhancing the company's efforts to revolutionize surgical procedures and improve patient outcomes.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties (NYSE: DOC) will release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 23, 2025, with a conference call scheduled on Oct 24, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. MT/10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Denver-based Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), specializing in healthcare real estate, will disclose its Q3 2025 financial figures post-market closure on October 23, 2025. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call and webcast on October 24, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Mountain Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern Time) to discuss its financial and operational outcomes.

data.title: Polygon's MATIC could hit $0.58 in 30 days, testing critical resistance & indicating 53% upside amidst bearish trend.
data.description: In October 2025, predictions suggest that the price of MATIC could face a resistance test at $0.58. Despite ongoing bearish momentum signals, the forecast for Polygon indicates a possible 53% increase in value.

data.title: Paramount Skydance Corp. (PSKY) names Makan Delrahim as Chief Legal Officer effective Oct. 6, 2025.
data.description: Today, Paramount Skydance Corporation (Nasdaq: PSKY) revealed the selection of Makan Delrahim as Chief Legal Officer, starting October 6, 2025. Delrahim will be in charge of legal, regulatory, compliance, and public policy issues for the company.

data.title: TechnipFMC wins contract from ExxonMobil for Guyana's Hammerhead project, providing subsea systems; part of Subsea 2.0 platform.
data.description: TechnipFMC, a leading company in the industry with NYSE ticker FTI, recently secured a significant contract from ExxonMobil Guyana Limited. This contract involves the supply of subsea production systems for the Hammerhead project located in the Stabroek Block in Guyana. The scope of work includes project management, engineering, and manufacturing of subsea production systems to facilitate both production and water injection processes. The project will utilize products from the innovative Subsea 2.0® platform, which includes subsea trees and manifolds. These systems will support the development of the Hammerhead project, signaling a substantial collaboration in the energy sector.

data.title: UN General Assembly opening featured Sing for Hope HandaHarmony Youth Chorus, promoting arts at the international platform.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, the United Nations General Assembly commenced with the melodious tunes of the Sing for Hope HandaHarmony Youth Chorus, backed by the International Foundation for Arts. This marks a unique beginning, as the youthful voices set the tone for the event without the traditional gavel or formal address. The chorus showcased the power of music in setting a positive atmosphere for the assembly, emphasizing the importance of youth engagement.

data.title: KNOT Offshore Partners LP Q2 2025 results: $87.1M in total revenues, $22.2M in operating income, $6.8M in net income, $51.6M in Adjusted EBITDA, and $104.8M in available liquidity.
data.description: In Aberdeen, Scotland, KNOT Offshore Partners LP (NYSE: KNOP) released its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. During this period, the Partnership achieved total revenues of $87.1 million, operating income of $22.2 million, and net income of $6.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA reached $51.6 million. As of June 30, 2025, the company reported $104.8 million in available liquidity, consisting of cash and cash equivalents.

data.title: EDDA Tech named on TIME's 2025 list of Top HealthTech Companies. Global provider of imaging-guided solutions.
data.description: EDDA Technology, a prominent global provider of advanced imaging-guided precision treatment solutions, was recently acknowledged on TIME's first-ever list of the World's Top HealthTech Companies 2025. This recognition was achieved through a collaboration with Statista Inc. and highlights the company's leading position in the industry. The list showcases the top companies in the health technology sector, with EDDA Technology standing out among competitors for its innovative contributions.
